name: html-slide
description: Create stunning, self-contained HTML slide decks (single .html file, zero dependencies) with keynote-grade typography, preset design themes, and Apple.com-style visual effects. Fixed 1920x1080 stage auto-scaled to any viewport fixes the tiny-text and shrink-wrapped-box defects of naive AI-generated HTML slides. Three AWS branding modes: customer-session (AWS deck cover + branded footer + Amazon Ember/Nanum Gothic fonts), logo-only, none.
author: jesamkim

skills.name: html-slide
skills.description: Keynote-grade HTML presentation generator: single self-contained file, fixed 1920x1080 stage with transform-scale fit, design-px typography contract (body 36-48px, headings 64-80px, hero stats 280px+), 5 preset themes with mandatory per-topic variation, 18-layout catalog (incl. card-free and chart layouts) with Mix Rule + Surface-variety rule, effects library incl. pinned storytelling and chart draw-on. Trigger on: html slide, html 슬라이드, web slides, 웹 슬라이드, html presentation, 브라우저 슬라이드, 애니메이션 슬라이드, 임팩트 있는 슬라이드
